arcGoal: Unlock the secrets of soul absorption and surpass his peers
arcConflict: Kael's obsession with strength leads to neglecting relationships and questioning his own identity
emotionalShift: From detachment to desperation, Kael begins to crave human connection

arcGoal: Understand the nature of memories and the cost of absorbing them
arcConflict: Kael's growing identity crisis worsens as he struggles to integrate new memories
emotionalShift: From desperation to despair, Kael confronts the reality of losing himself

arcGoal: Find a way to balance his strength with his humanity and relationships
arcConflict: Kael's reputation as a ruthless cultivator puts him at odds with those he cares about
emotionalShift: From despair to determination, Kael seeks redemption and self-acceptance

arcGoal: Make amends for past mistakes and find a new path forward
arcConflict: Kael faces the consequences of his actions and must confront the darkness within himself
emotionalShift: From determination to introspection, Kael finds peace in self-acceptance and forgiveness
